source_intent.raw_intent: Case 008: I am a nontechnical_business_owner in Africa. Build a mirroros_analysis_prompt for memory_engrave using the runtime_lens. Chaos input type is language_mixed_prompt. The source is intentionally messy: mix missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Produce a governed artifact with explicit validation gates. Return something SR8 can compile into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

parsed_tester_json.compiled_intent: Objective: Generate a MirrorOS analysis prompt that can be memory-engraved for a nontechnical business owner in Africa, using the runtime_lens to handle language-mixed, chaotic input with missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Scope: - The prompt must produce a structured analysis artifact that includes explicit validation gates, SR8-compilable sections (Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract), and be suitable for Codex runtime execution. Constraints: - Input is language-mixed and may contain incomplete or contradictory information. - Output must be governed and auditable, with clear validation checkpoints. - Must not assume technical expertise from the business owner. - Must respect regional and cultural context of Africa. - All sections must be SRXML-compliant for SR8 compilation. Success Criteria: - The generated prompt can be directly used for memory engraving in MirrorOS. - All validation gates are explicitly defined and testable. - The output contract is unambiguous and actionable. - The artifact handles chaotic input without loss of governance. Output Contract: - format: SRXML - sections: Objective; Scope; Constraints; Success Criteria; Output Contract - validation_gates: Gate 1: Input sanitization and language normalization.; Gate 2: Context reconstruction from partial data.; Gate 3: Constraint extraction and conflict resolution.; Gate 4: Acceptance criteria disambiguation.; Gate 5: Final compliance check against SR8 schema. - runtime: Codex - target_audience: Nontechnical business owner in Africa
